title: ENSO and IMD June-September rainfall by region
unit: degrees C anomaly, mm, percent departure

geography.name: India and IMD homogeneous rainfall regions

metadata.officialEventRule: Five or more consecutive overlapping ONI seasons at >= +0.5 C for El Nino or <= -0.5 C for La Nina, marked mechanically from NOAA ONI rows.
metadata.note: This join is chart-ready context, not causal attribution. Indian monsoon outcomes also depend on IOD, intraseasonal distribution, circulation, land conditions, and policy response.
